name: forge
description: Production-grade agent team orchestration with two modes: greenfield (PRD + design + build) and existing codebase (explore + plan + build). Cross-model adversarial review via Codex.

codex_enabled.title: Codex Adversarial Review
codex_enabled.description: Enable Codex adversarial review (requires codex-plugin-cc installed)

stitch_enabled.title: Google Stitch Design
stitch_enabled.description: Enable Google Stitch MCP for visual design generation in greenfield mode

prod_paths.title: Production Paths
prod_paths.description: Comma-separated glob patterns for paths requiring hard Codex gate (e.g. infrastructure/**,terraform/**)

default_generator_model.title: Generator Model
default_generator_model.description: Model for generator agents: opus (quality) or sonnet (speed/cost)
